Summary
DescriptionValencia (Ricardo Tormo) track map.svg
English: Track map of Circuit Valencia (Ricardo Tormo). Don't confuse this with the street circuit in downtown Valencia.
Date
10-5-2008
Source
Own work
Author
Will Pittenger
Other versions
Circuit Valencia.png - Old PNG with very little data and just one layout - obsolete
Circuit Valencia.svg - SVG version of Circuit Valencia.png - obsolete
Circuit Valensia (test).png - Misnamed PNG with more data - obsolete
This W3C-unspecified vector image was created with Inkscape .
Camera location39° 29′ 07.3″ N, 0° 37′ 50.8″ W View this and other nearby images on: OpenStreetMap 39.485361; -0.630778
